summary: Iteration 228 - AI Mantra DJ Auto-Compose Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - DJ Auto button visible, 6 goal cards displayed, track generation working. The revenue.py fidelity_status bug fix verified.
critical_code_review_comments: mixer_director.py: AUTO_COMPOSE_GOALS dict correctly defines 6 wellness goals with frequencies, ambience, mantras, and volume curves
mixer_director.py: Volume curves (descending, ascending, sustained, wave, arc) implemented correctly via lambda functions
mixer_director.py: Cross-fade overlap calculated correctly with staggered start_times
mixer_director.py: Hexagram resonance tone added as bonus layer with start_time=0 (plays throughout composition)
mixer_director.py: AI credit deduction implemented (decrements ai_credits_remaining by 1)
mixer_director.py: Tier-gating implemented - tracks limited by layer_cap based on subscription tier
revenue.py: Line 37-38 fixed - credits_doc isinstance check prevents crash when credits field is not a dict
SuanpanMixer.js: autoComposeOpen state and handleAutoCompose callback properly implemented
SuanpanMixer.js: Auto-compose panel UI with 6 goal cards renders correctly with proper icons and colors
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 228 verified the AI Mantra DJ Auto-Compose feature: (1) GET /api/mixer/auto-compose/goals returns 6 wellness goals (deep_sleep, focus, energy, healing, meditation, grounding). (2) POST /api/mixer/auto-compose generates tracks based on goal with correct volume curves (descending for sleep, ascending for energy, sustained for focus/grounding, wave for healing, arc for meditation). (3) Cross-fade overlaps work correctly with staggered start_times. (4) Hexagram resonance tone added as bonus layer. (5) AI credit deducted on compose. (6) Tier-gating limits tracks based on subscription. (7) GET /api/fidelity/status no longer crashes (revenue.py fix verified). (8) Frontend: DJ Auto button visible in toolbar and empty state, 6 goal cards render correctly, clicking a goal generates tracks in timeline. Test user is on ultra_player tier.

auto_compose_goals_endpoint.details: GET /api/mixer/auto-compose/goals returns 6 goals with key, label, description, base_duration

auto_compose_deep_sleep.details: Returns tracks with descending volume curve for restorative rest

auto_compose_focus.details: Returns alpha-beta tracks with sustained volume curve

auto_compose_energy.details: Returns high-frequency tracks with ascending volume curve

auto_compose_healing.details: Returns full solfeggio cascade with wave volume curve

auto_compose_meditation.details: Returns theta-alpha tracks with arc volume curve

auto_compose_grounding.details: Returns low-frequency tracks with sustained volume curve

crossfade_staggered_start_times.details: Tracks have staggered start_times with cross-fade overlap (hexagram track at start_time=0 by design)

hexagram_resonance.details: Auto-compose includes hexagram_resonance frequency in response

fidelity_status_fix.details: GET /api/fidelity/status returns 200 with tier_id, tier_label, discount_pct, boost_packs

frontend_dj_auto_button.details: DJ Auto button visible in toolbar and empty state

frontend_goal_cards.details: All 6 goal cards (deep_sleep, focus, energy, healing, meditation, grounding) visible in auto-compose panel

frontend_track_generation.details: Clicking a goal card generates tracks and populates timeline (6 tracks generated for focus goal)

existing_endpoints.details: All previously working endpoints still functional (mixer/subscription, mixer/sources, mixer/projects, mixer/recommendations, auth/me)
